name: Microwave Apricot-Strawberry Compote
recipeIngredient: Zest from 1 lemon, plus additional for garnish
6 Dried apricots, cut into thin strips
Fresh strawberries, hulled and quartered, 2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the white wine, cranberry juice, lemon zest, and ginger in a small microwave-safe bowl. Cook uncovered on HIGH for 2 minutes.
2. Add the apricots and cook for an additional minute. Stir in the vanilla extract.
3. Let the mixture cool to room temperature, then refrigerate until cold, at least one hour.
4. Just before serving, remove the lemon zest and stir in the strawberries. Serve cold, garnished with fresh lemon zest strips.
